creator: Lars.Koeller@Uni-Bielefeld.DE
text:
New port libhelp-1.8.1, a MOTIF HTML help system client/lib

Fix: 

Grab
	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/libhelp-1.8.1.tar.gz

	Check my changes, especially the install and post-install
	procedures, the install location /usr/X11R6/lib/xmhelp, etc.

	Thanks and regards

	Lars
